name: Centuria Office Reit
analysis: COF's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.9150, stop A$0.8662, target A$1.0076 (1.90:1) — then trail it.
